observations.issue: Opening road description over-explained the estate's prosperity.
observations.action: Cut harvest-logic scaffolding and kept only money, labor, frost, and grain.

observations.issue: Gate-approach paragraph repeated tactical lack twice.
observations.action: Dropped the extra bow-lane clause and kept the ranger contrast.

observations.issue: Gate-guard intro spent too many words on the same social read.
observations.action: Condensed robe/horse/staff assessment into one sharper sentence.

observations.issue: Estate-yard passage stacked atmosphere and logistics.
observations.action: Cut stone-air phrasing and kept busy, fed, orderly.

observations.issue: Hall entry lingered on warmth twice.
observations.action: Removed the standalone warmth beat and folded the enchanted-heating reveal into the hall paragraph.

observations.issue: Alexei's physical read had redundant tailoring and hand-detail layers.
observations.action: Kept noble cut and polish, dropped the extra professional-disqualification detail.

observations.issue: Lake approach spent too long on mist and boat handling.
observations.action: Compressed landing, rowing, and ward-contact into the useful beats.

observations.issue: Caer Darrow arrival repeated fortress-read with excess phrasing.
observations.action: Tightened fortress conversion and defense language.

observations.issue: Desk study section repeated Jaina's fatigue and hesitation.
observations.action: Kept notes, resonance, and urgency; cut cushioning around them.

observations.issue: Dialogue used report-like emphasis ('interesting enough to bring me here').
observations.action: Downshifted to the cleaner 'Your grain routes brought me here.'

observations.issue: Alexei's academy defense drifted toward document voice.
observations.action: Shortened to a spoken noble's phrasing while preserving contempt for the cities.

observations.issue: Jandice entrance catalogued robe construction too mechanically.
observations.action: Kept Dalaran cut, working sleeves, ink, and reagent scars; cut the rest.

observations.issue: 'Researchers. Archive staff.' sounded listy and institutional in speech.
observations.action: Changed to 'Researchers. Archivists.' and trimmed the doctrine line.

observations.issue: Inspection challenge ran long and read like performed wit.
observations.action: Cut to a shorter, cleaner challenge that still sounds like Jandice.

observations.issue: Corridor description added dusting and ruin-cleanliness in duplicate.
observations.action: Kept limewash/ink/lamp-oil texture and removed extra maintenance phrasing.

observations.issue: Lecture-room beat over-explained Jaina's recognition.
observations.action: Removed redundant lead-in and left the notation hit to land on its own.

observations.issue: Archive setup had too many handling details before the ledger mattered.
observations.action: Cut hinge warmth and excess cabinet business, kept reverence and notation shock.

observations.issue: Vague intensifier ('something fouler') ducked the stink.
observations.action: Named it as rot.

observations.issue: Vague intensifier ('something uglier') softened Jaina's judgment.
observations.action: Changed to 'rot' for a harder landing.

observations.issue: Vague intensifier ('something deeper') laundered the hidden work.
observations.action: Changed to 'deeper work.'

observations.issue: Guest-chamber paper/committee exchange drifted into extra cleverness.
observations.action: Compressed it to the instruction that matters: write it down.

observations.issue: Antonidas call repeated signal-distortion and council obstruction beats.
observations.action: Cut duplicate interference phrasing and the side exchange about the Council.

observations.issue: Master-permission exchange spent words on the same result twice.
observations.action: Removed the ornamental defense beat and kept the permission.

observations.issue: Jaina's question used formal 'been conducted' construction.
observations.action: Shifted to spoken phrasing: 'been doing scholarly work.'

observations.issue: Jandice's invitation leaned too far toward performance language.
observations.action: Trimmed it to a cleaner spoken challenge.

observations.issue: Jandice's 'honest' sample line played well, but the archivist-reaction tag over-explained the moment.
observations.action: Cut the reaction beat and let the exchange stand.

observations.issue: Jaina's resonance hypothesis used overbuilt phrasing ('keeps shouting loud enough').
observations.action: Changed to 'keeps calling it back, crude and loud.'

observations.issue: Jandice's explanation was strong but padded by one extra staging beat.
observations.action: Removed a redundant motion line before the core theory.

observations.issue: Stair banter delayed the descent after the fungi reveal.
observations.action: Kept the fungi response, cut the extra hostile/comprehensible exchange.

observations.issue: Protection warning had an extra affirmation beat after it.
observations.action: Dropped the closing 'Good.' and kept the threat hanging.

changes.before: Cart tracks crossed the road with the patient logic of harvest work done at scale.
changes.after: Barov grain fed half a province, and the estate meant to keep it moving.

changes.before: One glance went to her staff, then the horse, then the quality of her robes...
changes.after: One glance went to her staff, then the horse, then the cut of her robes...
Men crossed the yard with baskets, ledgers, harness, sacks.

changes.before: Your grain routes have become very interesting. Interesting enough to bring me here.
changes.after: Your grain routes brought me here.

changes.before: Rural patronage of scholarship is not a crime, though I admit the larger cities often behave that way.
changes.after: Patronizing scholarship is not a crime, though the larger cities often behave as if it is.

changes.before: The seam work was right, so was the weight of the fabric...
changes.after: The sleeves would not catch at the wrist while working.

changes.before: I would rather have the inspection where I can watch it.
Dalaran with something fouler laid over it.
changes.after: Dalaran with rot laid over it.

changes.before: The shown rooms rode over something deeper.
changes.after: The shown rooms rode over deeper work.

changes.before: You should write down whatever version of this you intend to send home.
changes.after: Write it down before you send it home.

changes.before: The model from the outpost was right.
keeps shouting loud enough to wake it
changes.after: keeps calling it back, crude and loud

changes.before: You prefer your wonders hostile? / I prefer them comprehensible.
changes.after: Cut to keep the descent pressure moving.

flags: Kept 'resonance', 'field', and 'method' in the late Jaina/Jandice exchange because this is peer-to-peer mage register, not bureaucratic speech.
Kept Alexei's formal polish intact where it serves his class performance rather than reading like a report.
